Styles › Industrial

1990s – present · Global

Industrial

Raw, urban, utilitarian — exposed structure, big windows.

  • Overview
  • Design Philosophy
  • Visual Characteristics
  • Materials
  • Color Palette
  • Façade Guide
  • Lighting
  • Building Types
  • Design Checklist
  • Common Mistakes
  • AI Prompts
  • Gallery
  • Related

01 — Overview

Overview

Definition. Industrial style turns the language of factories and warehouses into architecture — exposed structure, brick and steel, large multi-pane windows and an honest, utilitarian exterior.

Historical background. Emerging from loft conversions of disused industrial buildings, the aesthetic of exposed services and robust materials became a deliberate design language for new build.

Origin. Former industrial cities of Europe and North America.

Timeline

1990

Warehouse loft conversions popularise the look

2000

Adaptive reuse of power stations & factories

2012

Industrial exteriors adopted for new build

2020

Hybrid brick-and-steel housing & offices

Key Architects

Herzog & de MeuronRicardo Bofill (reuse)Adaptive-reuse practices

Influential Projects

Tate Modern

Herzog & de Meuron · 2000
London, UK

Battersea Power Station

Giles Gilbert Scott (reuse) · 2022
London, UK

Zollverein Complex

OMA (masterplan) · 2001
Essen, Germany

02 — Design Philosophy

Design Philosophy

Core Principles

Exposed structureHonest materialsUtility as aestheticAdaptive reuseRobustness

The Thinking

Beauty is found in the unfinished and functional — steel frames, brick walls and big industrial glazing left frankly visible rather than dressed.

Values It Represents

AuthenticityDurabilitySustainability through reuseCharacter

Why It Emerged

Born of economical loft living and a taste for patina, it celebrates the dignity of working buildings.

03 — Visual Characteristics

Visual Characteristics

MassingStrong rectangular sheds and blocks; large simple volumes.
Form LanguageRobust, boxy, functional; saw-tooth or gabled industrial roof profiles.
CompositionRepetitive structural bays and big openings.
ProportionGenerous, tall floor-to-floor; large glazing modules.
GeometryOrthogonal and direct.
RhythmInsistent repetition of steel bays and window grids.
SymmetryOften regular and symmetrical along the bays.
ScaleLarge and urban; warehouse proportions.
Roof TypesFlat, saw-tooth (north-light) or shallow gable with exposed steel.
Window ProportionLarge steel-framed multi-pane (Crittall) and warehouse glazing.
EntranceFunctional steel-and-glass openings, sometimes with canopies.
Façade ArticulationExposed brick and steel, visible structure, big industrial windows, weathered metal.

04 — Materials

Materials

Brick

The warm, robust skin of the working building.

Structural steel

Frames and trusses left frankly exposed.

Concrete

Raw columns, panels and floors.

Weathered metal

Corrugated and patinated cladding for honest character.

05 — Color Palette

Color Palette

Raw, earthy, urban — warm brick against cool dark steel.

Primary

Brick Red
#8a5a44
Iron Grey
#5e6166

Accent

Rust
#9c5a32
Black Steel
#2c2b29

Material Colors

Concrete
#9b9389
Zinc
#8d9296

Typical Combinations

  • +Brick + black steel + glass
  • +Concrete + rusted metal

06 — Façade Design Guide

Façade Design Guide

Window CompositionLarge steel-framed multi-pane grids; repeat across structural bays.
EmphasisHorizontal banding of big windows between brick piers.
Shading DevicesDeep reveals and projecting steel canopies.
BalconiesSteel galleries, gantries and external stairs as honest add-ons.
FramesBlack or galvanised steel, frankly expressed.
OpeningsBig, repetitive, gridded; loading-door references.
Architectural DetailsExposed beams, rivets, brackets, downpipes and weathering.
OrnamentationNone — structure, brick coursing and steelwork are the detail.

07 — Lighting

Lighting

Natural Lighting Strategy

Big multi-pane glazing and north-light saw-tooth roofs flood interiors; honestly expressed.

Artificial Lighting Concept

Exposed industrial fixtures and festoon/wire lighting.

Night Façade Appearance

Warm glow behind grid windows; uplit brick reveals texture.

Recommendations

Warm 2700K against brick; graze steelwork; keep fittings visible and utilitarian.

08 — Typical Building Types

Typical Building Types

Where this style performs best:

Lofts & apartmentsOffices & studiosGalleries & marketsBreweriesAdaptive reuseMixed-use

09 — Design Checklist

Design Checklist

Tap an item to mark it complete — saved to your browser.

  • Expose structure — steel frame and brick
  • Use large multi-pane steel windows
  • Keep robust, boxy massing on clear bays
  • Show services and steelwork honestly
  • Embrace patina and weathered metal
  • Add steel galleries/stairs as expressed elements
  • Keep palette brick + steel + concrete
  • Reference loading doors and industrial openings

10 — Common Mistakes

Common Mistakes

Elements that contradict the style — what to avoid:

  • ✕Faking exposed structure with thin decorative steel
  • ✕Small domestic windows instead of big industrial glazing
  • ✕Over-polished finishes that erase honest character
  • ✕Hiding the brick and steel behind cladding
  • ✕Pastel colour that contradicts the raw mood

11 — AI Prompt Examples

AI Prompt Examples

Optimised for Midjourney, ChatGPT image tools or Claude — exterior renders. Tap copy to use.

Exterior

Industrial building exterior, exposed brick and black steel structure, large multi-pane Crittall windows, saw-tooth roof, urban setting, overcast light, architectural photography --ar 3:2 --style raw

Façade Concept

Industrial façade, brick piers with big steel-framed window grids, exposed beams and brackets, weathered metal, frontal elevation, raking light

Night View

Industrial building exterior at night, warm glow behind grid windows, uplit brick, exposed steel, moody urban architectural night photography

Aerial View

Aerial of an industrial-style complex, saw-tooth roofs, brick blocks, steel structure, urban yard, drone photography

Street Perspective

Street view of an industrial loft exterior, brick façade, tall steel windows, steel canopy entrance, documentary urban photography

Masterplan

Industrial-district masterplan, repurposed sheds, brick blocks and yards, rail references, axonometric, brick and steel palette
